textByHash.f36af76e755eeea94f368b0455ae162f82f6eff2: My name is Jessie. I help look after the forest.
textByHash.cfda2897710da4cd1e0c7e5db97da5e17e59cf8a: I do. There're all sorts of interesting creatures around here. Be careful, some of them are not very friendly. A lot of travellers have become their victims.
textByHash.cb00547a7e21ba5503770c530ca2b66e048da2b5: No problem! Safe travels my friend.
